text: Took my car to Pete's Auto Body on Route 1 and they scratched the whole passenger side during the repair. Terrible work, would not recommend. The paint doesn't even match.
Hari and his team did an amazing job on my Accord. The paint match is perfect and they finished a day early. Best body shop in Edison.
Good work on my F-150. Tailgate looks like new. Only took 5 days which is faster than the other shops I called. Would use again.
Had my CR-V repaired here after a parking lot incident. Amit was super helpful and kept me updated throughout. The work is flawless.
Solid body shop. Fixed a deep scratch on my BMW for a reasonable price. Professional team.
Been bringing my cars here since 2017. Hari always gives honest estimates and does quality work. The Envirobase paint they use is top notch.
Work was good but took a little longer than estimated. Communication could be better. End result was fine though.
Just picked up my Malibu. Door ding is completely gone, can't even tell where it was. Fast turnaround too. Highly recommend!
Fair pricing, good quality. They handled my insurance claim without any hassle. Maya in the office is very helpful.
Had a fender bender and took it here on a friend's recommendation. They did a great job and the price was fair. Will definitely come back.
Professional and friendly. My car looks great.
